ai_guidance.human_next_step: Dispatch OBJ-001, REW-001, EQP-001, RNG-001, LED-001, and PRG-001 in parallel from exact main commit 0e678a9333956aa29ba2e3598265c8e1a4122e72 using assembly/dispatch/wave1/.
notes: Chat context is temporary; merged repository files are authoritative.
Reward/progression Wave 0 is complete: PR #130 merged AUD-001, PR #132 merged ADR-001, and PR #131 merged DEMO-001.
Wave 1 consists of six independent foundations: OBJ-001, REW-001, EQP-001, RNG-001, LED-001, and PRG-001.
Wave 1 agents use exact base 0e678a9333956aa29ba2e3598265c8e1a4122e72 and may run in parallel on non-overlapping paths.
RNG-001 is narrowed to random and Progression/Curves paths; PRG-001 exclusively owns Progression/Context paths.

The proposed visible-slice batch contains VS-001 through VS-007: local art intake blocks only room/turret art consumers, HUD/loadout/camera may begin independently, and one serial integration-scene owner runs last.
WP-010 is merged through PR #102 and retains exclusive ownership of its Stage1Presentation folder and focused test; VS tasks consume it read-only.
The visible-slice proposal authorizes 3.15 focused lead days without raising the accepted 50-day Stage 1 cap: 2.55 days of task estimates plus 0.60 day held for integration defects.
PRs #106, #107, and #108 are superseded prototype branches; reusable intent is recorded in the amendment, but their submitted diffs must not merge.
VS branches may add only exact task-local leaf metadata and must not add shared ancestor .meta files.
MT-013 remains an optional test-only movement-playground leaf: it consumes accepted MT-007/MT-010 runtime read-only, blocks no existing task, and introduces no production scene or gameplay authority.
The human-selected no-player-motion recoil amendment retires CB-007; existing recoil data is non-authoritative and may not alter player velocity, position, thruster, or collision state.
The approved Stage 1 cap is 50 focused lead days / 12 calendar weeks; S1.0 is 12 focused lead days / 3 calendar weeks.
Ordinary Stage 1 implementation PRs are accepted by Nemo's proof-complete merge; central lifecycle bookkeeping is batched once per wave and is not a dependency gate.
Seven Stage 2 batch ranges are preserved as deferred planning and remain locked behind GATE-010.
No Stage 2 task file, multiplayer/networking implementation, or Stage 2 dispatch is authorized.
